Brilli is awake and present.

Brilli

The intelligence behind the platform, given form. This is a Canvas 2D procedural prototype matching the spec in 05-brilli-animation.md.

Notes

Visibility is gated: switch tabs and Brilli pauses cleanly. Reduced-motion fallback is active when system preference is set.

Mockup · Canvas 2D procedural · ES5 module pattern · ~10KB target
